name: @fhajjej/loop-it
description: Portable Agent Skill for setting bounded coding loops in Codex, Claude Code, Cursor, and SKILL.md-compatible agents.

scripts.check: node --check bin/loop-it.mjs && node --check skills/loop-it/scripts/create-loop.mjs && node --check tests/smoke-install.mjs && node -e "const fs=require('fs'); ['.codex-plugin/plugin.json','.claude-plugin/plugin.json','.cursor-plugin/plugin.json'].forEach((file)=>JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(file,'utf8')))" && npm run smoke && npm pack --dry-run
